import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './AnimatedLogin.css'; const AnimatedLogin = () => { const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [password, setPassword] = useState(''); const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false); const [emailFocused, setEmailFocused] = useState(false); const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Add your login logic here console.log('Login attempted with:', { email, password }); }; const handleEmailFocus = () => { setEmailFocused(true); }; const handleEmailBlur = () => { if (!email) { setEmailFocused(false); } }; return (
setEmail(e.target.value)} onFocus={handleEmailFocus} onBlur={handleEmailBlur} />

email@domain.com

setPassword(e.target.value)} />
); }; export default AnimatedLogin;
